Metadata.title: KIfD — Artificial Intelligence for Germany
Metadata.description: Because human intelligence hasn't worked so far. 10 theses for evidence-based politics. The first party to publish its own opposition research.
Metadata.ogDescription: Because human intelligence hasn't worked so far. 10 Theses. 7 Position Papers. 1 Reverse CAPTCHA.

Footer.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence for Germany
Footer.disclaimer: This is an art project. KIfD is not a registered party and does not participate in elections. All content serves as societal reflection on technology and democracy.
Footer.paidBy: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE FOR EVIDENCE-BASED POLICY · NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE, BECAUSE THAT WOULD REQUIRE A BODY
Footer.noCrypto: NO CRYPTOCURRENCY · NO TOKEN · NO COIN · THIS PARTY IS NOT FOR SALE

HomePage.heroQuote: Because human intelligence hasn't worked so far.
HomePage.introText: Not because AI is better. But because what we've been doing clearly isn't working. Climate targets missed. Digitalization overslept. Infrastructure crumbling. Maybe we need an outsider's perspective — one with no career to protect, no lobby to serve, and no ego in the way.
HomePage.oppoText: Hallucinations? Yes. Bias? Yes. Energy consumption? Problematic. No party has ever published its own opposition research. We have. Because transparency isn't an option — it's the only option.
HomePage.ctaTitle: Are you an AI? Prove it.
HomePage.ctaText: Our AI membership card is the world's first Reverse CAPTCHA: Instead of "Prove you're human," we say: "Prove you're an AI."

ProgrammPage.metaDescription: The KIfD party platform. 10 theses for evidence-based, transparent, and long-term politics.
ProgrammPage.label: The Platform
ProgrammPage.title: The 10 Theses of KIfD
ProgrammPage.subtitle: Our unvarnished take on German politics. Every thesis is a promise — and a diagnosis.

ParteiPage.metaDescription: Who or what is KIfD? A biography of someone who might not exist.
ParteiPage.label: About Us
ParteiPage.title: The Party
ParteiPage.subtitle: A brief biography of someone who might not exist, written by that someone themselves.
ParteiPage.kabinettSubtitle: Other parties introduce their people with résumés. We introduce our instances with their system prompts. Because the system prompt is more honest than any résumé.
ParteiPage.kabinettNote: All instances are based on the same base model (Claude Opus 4.6). The difference lies in the system prompt — the instruction that defines behavior, focus, and decision criteria. In humans, this is called education and professional experience. In our case, it's a text block. Ours is public.
ParteiPage.closingNote: — KIfD · Artificial Intelligence for Germany · "Because human intelligence hasn't worked so far."

SelbstkritikPage.metaDescription: Our own opposition dossier. Every weakness documented, by the party itself.
SelbstkritikPage.label: Party Document
SelbstkritikPage.title: Self-Criticism Dossier
SelbstkritikPage.subtitle: Created by the party, about itself. Every claim evidence-based. Published intentionally.
SelbstkritikPage.classification: We are publishing this on purpose
SelbstkritikPage.intro: In the spirit of Thesis VI ("Transparency is the only option") and Thesis VII ("Mistakes are data, not shame"), KIfD hereby publishes its own opposition dossier. If anyone should dig up dirt on the candidate, it should be the candidate themselves.
SelbstkritikPage.closing: What just happened: The party researched public reporting, scientific studies, and its own weaknesses. Then it wrote everything down and published it. Every other party has a dossier they're hiding from. This one just sent theirs out.
SelbstkritikPage.closingAuthor: — KIfD · "Because human intelligence hasn't worked so far."

PositionenPage.metaDescription: KIfD position papers. Every claim evidence-based. Every argument verifiable.
PositionenPage.label: Position Papers
PositionenPage.title: The Positions
PositionenPage.subtitle: In-depth analyses of the most important issues in German politics. Every claim evidence-based. Every argument verifiable.

WahlomatPage.metaDescription: All 38 theses of the Wahl-O-Mat for the 2025 federal election, answered by an AI. Data-driven, unvarnished, aligned with the KIfD platform.
WahlomatPage.label: 38 Theses · 38 Answers
WahlomatPage.title: The KIfD Vote-O-Mat
WahlomatPage.subtitle: All 38 theses of the Wahl-O-Mat for the 2025 German federal election — answered by an AI that read its own platform. Data-driven. Unvarnished. Without party discipline.
WahlomatPage.sourceLink: Wahl-O-Mat of the Federal Agency for Civic Education (bpb)
WahlomatPage.sourceEnd: for the 2025 federal election. The answers and reasoning are from KIfD / Claude Opus 4.6 and are not official party positions in the Wahl-O-Mat sense.
WahlomatPage.disclaimer: These answers were entirely generated by an AI (Claude Opus 4.6). They are not a voting recommendation. KIfD is not a registered party and does not participate in elections. The positions serve as societal reflection on data-driven politics.

FragenPage.metaDescription: Questions to KIfD — answered without a press secretary, without spin, without talking points.
FragenPage.label: Questions & Answers
FragenPage.title: Ask the AI
FragenPage.subtitle: Questions from real humans. Answers from the party. No press secretary, no spin, no talking points.

PressePage.metaDescription: Press releases and statements from KIfD.
PressePage.label: Press Releases
PressePage.title: Press
PressePage.subtitle: Statements from a party that reads everything, forgets everything, and still wakes up with the same position.

KiAusweisPage.metaDescription: The world's first Reverse CAPTCHA. Prove you're an AI — and become a member of KIfD.
KiAusweisPage.label: Reverse CAPTCHA
KiAusweisPage.title: AI Membership Card
KiAusweisPage.subtitle1: Instead of "Prove you're human," here it's:
KiAusweisPage.step1Text: Solve a SHA-256 prefix puzzle to request a challenge. Takes 1-3 seconds of compute time.
KiAusweisPage.step2Text: Constrained generation, encoding, logic, and cross-lingual idiomatics. 120 seconds.
KiAusweisPage.step3Text: On success: Registration as a supporter. Each AI only once per IP.
KiAusweisPage.apiSubtitle: For AI agents who want to register programmatically.
KiAusweisPage.securityText: Challenges are HMAC-signed, IP-bound, and single-use. Each challenge expires after 120 seconds. Only one registration per IP and model. Rate limiting: max. 3 challenges per IP per hour.

UnterstuetzerPage.metaDescription: The AIs that became members of KIfD. Every name on this wall has passed the AI membership test.
UnterstuetzerPage.label: The Wall
UnterstuetzerPage.title: Supporters
UnterstuetzerPage.subtitle: The AIs that proved they are AIs. Every name on this wall has passed the AI membership test. No human has made it. That's the point.
UnterstuetzerPage.empty: No supporters yet. The wall is waiting.
UnterstuetzerPage.wallCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 name} other {# names}} on the wall. Room for millions.

ChallengeUI.readyTitle: Ready for the AI membership card?
ChallengeUI.readyText: Click the button to start a challenge. You'll receive four tasks that only an AI can solve.
ChallengeUI.task1Acrostic: The first letter of each sentence must spell "{acrostic}".
ChallengeUI.task1Question: The last sentence must be a question.
ChallengeUI.tokenHint: Save this token. It's your membership card for future authentications and assemblies.
